CASE MANAGEMENT CONFERENCE
Off Calendar Feb-03-2005 Off Calendar

Default Prove-Up In Scd.
Off Calendar Jan-20-2005 Granted Per Written Order
MINI MINUTES: This cause came on regularly as scheduled for Default Prove-Up Hearing this day.
Comm. Sue Kaplan, Clerk: S. Ravinantapricha, CSR: Tony Vaughn.
Joseph Demko, Esq. for Plaintiff: Trans Pacific National Bank, a National Banking Assoc. Plaintiff's witness: Kiran Mehta, was sworn and examined.
After hearing the evidence presented, the Court rules in favor of the Plaintiff and against the Defaulted Defendant: Edwin Go aka E. Go as follows:
Principal $737,371.00
Attorney's Fees $21,572.13
Costs per cost bill and Interest at the legal rate.
Judgment signed in open court.
